_patch_meta.description: VC session vc-134 — RE-EVALUATION revisions for five terms. H2475 (6136): group 6136-001 dissolved, Prov 31:8 reassigned wrong_face per DF-001. H2487 (1098): 8 set_aside_reason backfills on prior-set-aside verses per §3.2 (Job 10:17 retained unchanged per DF-004). H4253 (6134): group 6134-001 dissolved, all three Judg 16 verses reassigned wrong_face per DF-002. G0341 (6132) and G0342 (1097) declared in terms_covered with no operations — prior state retained exactly (DF-003 Option A); applicator per §7.8 flips vc_status from terms_covered scope.

set.notes: Dissolved on VC v3_4 re-evaluation — sole verse (Prov 31:8) reassigned as wrong_face per researcher DF-001 ruling 2026-04-24. Inner-being content in verse carried by imperative advocacy framing ('open your mouth for the mute'), not by cha.loph which names physical/social vulnerability.

operations.description: Dissolve group 6136-001 — sole verse reassigned as wrong_face on re-evaluation (DF-001)

set.notes: wrong_face: re-evaluation DF-001 (researcher ruling 2026-04-24). Inner-being content in Prov 31:8 carried by imperative advocacy framing ('open your mouth for the mute, for the rights of all who are destitute'), not by cha.loph which names the physical/social condition of the perishing. Term does not carry inner-being function in this verse. Previously classified as anchor of group 6136-001; group dissolved in same patch.

operations.description: Prov 31:8 — revise from anchor to set-aside (wrong_face), per DF-001 Option B

set.notes: Literal change(s) of clothes given as gifts (Joseph to his brothers). Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Wager item ('thirty changes of clothes') in Samson's riddle. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Same wager item in Samson's riddle conditions. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Garments taken as wager payment. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Administrative labour rotation ('in shifts'); work cycle with no inner-being engagement. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Ten changes of clothing carried by Naaman as gift. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Two changes of clothing in Gehazi's false request. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Two changes of clothing in delivery of Naaman's gift. Reason backfilled on VC v3_4 re-evaluation per §3.2 — set_aside_reason was NULL from pre-VCB-032 classification. Verse remains set aside; no change in is_relevant state.

Dissolved on VC v3_4 re-evaluation — all three verses (Judg 16:13, 14, 19) reassigned as wrong_face per researcher DF-002 ruling 2026-04-24. Inner-being content in Samson narrative (Nazirite consecration, God-given strength) carried by narrative frame and terms for strength/vow, not by ma.cha.la.phah which names the physical braid as material sign.
